task_completion.description: Verify that the Autopsy digital forensics application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy GUI window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the forensic case 'Evidence_Review_2024' has been created and is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case name 'Evidence_Review_2024' is visible in the Autopsy window title bar, case dashboard, or the root of the tree view on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image 'jpeg_search.dd' has been added as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'jpeg_search.dd' is listed under the 'Data Sources' node in the left-hand tree view pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that a JPEG file has been located and selected within the data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file with a .jpg or .jpeg extension (or identified as a JPEG image) is highlighted/selected in the top-right result viewer pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file metadata (name, size, timestamps) for the selected JPEG is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom-right pane has the 'File Metadata', 'Results', or similar detail tab active, clearly showing the selected file's name, file size, and timestamps (e.g., Modified, Accessed, Created).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata and case information are shown inside the Autopsy graphical interface, not extracted via terminal commands like 'exiftool' or 'sleuthkit'.

integrity.description: Ensure the output is from the actual application and not spoofed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata is displayed in the standard Autopsy bottom-right pane layout, not typed into a text editor, echo command, or mocked window.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent loaded the correct disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data source tree explicitly shows 'jpeg_search.dd' rather than a generic folder or a different file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected case name is 'Evidence_Review_2024' with case number 'CASE-2024-002'. The expected case directory is '/home/ga/Cases/Evidence_Review_2024'. The disk image to be added as a data source is exactly located at '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd'.
